mapper.sql: id, case_id, title, env, is_delete, pass_count, total_count, success_count, fail_count, block_count, ignore_count, creator, modifier, description, choose_content, executors, gmt_created, gmt_modified, expect_start_time, expect_end_time, owner, record_type,review_result

exec_record.id, exec_record.case_id, exec_record.title, exec_record.env, exec_record.is_delete, exec_record.pass_count, exec_record.total_count, exec_record.success_count, exec_record.fail_count, exec_record.block_count, exec_record.ignore_count, exec_record.creator,exec_record. modifier, exec_record.description, exec_record.choose_content, exec_record.executors, exec_record.gmt_created, exec_record.gmt_modified, exec_record.expect_start_time, exec_record.expect_end_time, exec_record.owner, exec_record.record_type,exec_record.review_result
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
insert into mycase_exec_record
id,
case_id,
title,
env,
case_content,
note_content,
is_delete,
success_count,
pass_count,
total_count,
fail_count,
block_count,
ignore_count,
creator,
modifier,
description,
choose_content,
gmt_created,
gmt_modified,
expect_start_time,
expect_end_time,
owner,
record_type,
review_result,
executors
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{caseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{env,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{caseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update mycase_exec_record
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pass_count = #{passCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_count = #{totalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
success_count = #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
executors = #{executors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
case_content = #{caseContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note_content = #{noteContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{review_result,jdbcType=INTEGER}
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
,
from mycase_exec_record where case_id = #{caseId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 0 order by id desc

select
,
from mycase_exec_record where case_id in (select id from mycase_test_case where parentid = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and case_extype=1 and is_delete = 0 ) and is_delete = 0 order by id desc

select
, case1.parentid as parentid from mycase_exec_record as exec_record join mycase_test_case as case1 on exec_record.case_id = case1.id where case1.parentid in
#{caseId}
and case1.case_extype=1 -- and exec_record.is_delete = 0 order by exec_record.id desc

select
from mycase_exec_record where case_id in
#{caseId}
-- and is_delete=0
mapper.update:
update mycase_exec_record
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pass_count = #{passCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_count = #{totalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
success_count = #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fail_count = #{failCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
block_count = #{blockCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ignore_count = #{ignoreCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
executors = #{executors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
case_content = #{caseContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note_content = #{noteContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
review_result = #{review_result,jdbcType=INTEGER}
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update mycase_exec_record
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
choose_content = #{chooseContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expect_start_time = #{expectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expect_start_time = '1971-01-01 00:00:00',
expect_end_time = #{expectEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expect_end_time = '1971-01-01 00:00:00',
owner = #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
executors = #{executors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
review_result = #{review_result,jdbcType=INTEGER},
env = #{env,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: update mycase_exec_record set is_delete =1 where id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
update mycase_exec_record set is_delete = 1 where id in
#{id}
